## Issue to Resolve

[Reader IA - Bug] Followed P2s feed not showing in drop-down
![image](https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/assets/47797566/e0725f07-6802-477c-9f39-d6bbe0baa8ea)

>While comparing the viewpager tabs and feeds content for before / after, I see a missing menu item for "Followed P2S" (that is a filterable with only Sites and no Tags elements, I think similarly to the Automattic item)

What I was trying to say here is (using the same user for the before/after):
- the "Followed P2s" item is missing in the after

About how to get the Followed P2s on your side, what follows is my best guess
>I think that menu is related to P2 the product sites that I think I created in that account from https://p2help.wordpress.com/getting-started/creating-a-new-workspace/ if it's useful to create the test scenario.

but I can share my test account with you if it's quicker (just dm me in slack 👍 )

_Originally posted by @develric in https://github.com/wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android/issues/19856#issuecomment-1881059568_

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

We should also consider adding the analytics event for when this menu item is clicked.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/ReaderConstants.java`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/ReaderPostListFragment.java`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/tracker/ReaderTracker.kt`
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/reader/utils/ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:

- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

 14→import javax.inject.Inject
 15→
 16→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor() {
 17→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 18→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 19→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 20→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 21→            }
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 23→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 26→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 29→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 32→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList
 35→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 36→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 37→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 38→                    }
 39→                    sparseArray
 40→                }
 41→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 42→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 43→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 44→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 45→                }
 46→        }
 47→    }
 48→
 49→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 50→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 51→            id = id,
 52→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 53→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 54→        )
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 58→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 59→            id = id,
 60→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 61→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 62→        )
 63→    }
 64→
 65→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 66→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 67→            id = id,
 68→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 69→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 70→        )
 71→    }
 72→
 73→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 74→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 75→            id = id,
 76→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 77→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 78→        )
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 82→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 83→            id = id,
 84→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 85→        )
 86→    }
 87→
 88→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
 89→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
 90→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
 91→            customListsMenuItems.add(
 92→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 93→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
 94→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
 95→                )
 96→            )
 97→        }
 98→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
 99→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
100→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
101→            id = "custom-lists",
102→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
103→            children = customListsMenuItems,
104→        )
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
108→
109→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
110→}

 21→class ReaderTracker @Inject constructor(

 25→    private val analyticsUtilsWrapper: AnalyticsUtilsWrapper

 28→    // to sync the access to trackers; so to remove the @MainThread and make the
 29→    // usage of this class more transparent to its users
 30→    private val trackers = mutableMapOf<ReaderTrackerType, ReaderTrackerInfo>()
 31→
 32→    init {
 33→        for (trackerType in ReaderTrackerType.values()) {
 34→            trackers[trackerType] = ReaderTrackerInfo()
 35→        }
 36→    }

 38→    fun setupTrackers() {
 39→        for (key in trackers.keys) {
 40→            trackers[key] = ReaderTrackerInfo()
 41→        }
 42→    }
 43→
 44→    fun start(type: ReaderTrackerType) {
 45→        trackers[type]?.let {
 46→            if (!isRunning(type)) {
 47→                AppLog.d(AppLog.T.MAIN, "ReaderTracker: started $type")
 48→                trackers[type] = it.copy(startDate = dateProvider.getCurrentDate())
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→    }
 52→
 53→    fun stop(type: ReaderTrackerType) {
 54→        trackers[type]?.let { trackerInfo ->
 55→            if (isRunning(type)) {
 56→                AppLog.d(AppLog.T.MAIN, "ReaderTracker: stopped $type")
 57→                trackerInfo.startDate?.let { startDate ->
 58→                    val accumulatedTime = trackerInfo.accumulatedTime +
 59→                            DateTimeUtils.secondsBetween(dateProvider.getCurrentDate(), startDate)
 60→                    // let reset the startDate to null
 61→                    trackers[type] = ReaderTrackerInfo(accumulatedTime = accumulatedTime)
 62→                } ?: AppLog.e(AppLog.T.READER, "ReaderTracker > stop found a null startDate")
 63→            }
 64→        }
 65→    }
 66→
 67→    fun isRunning(type: ReaderTrackerType): Boolean {
 68→        return trackers[type]?.startDate != null
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    fun getAnalyticsData(): Map<String, Any> {
 72→        return trackers.entries.associate { it.key.propertyName to it.value.accumulatedTime }
 73→    }
 74→
 75→    fun trackReaderTabIfNecessary(readerTab: ReaderTab) {
 76→        if (readerTab != appPrefsWrapper.getReaderActiveTab()) {
 77→            when (readerTab) {
 78→                ReaderTab.FOLLOWING -> analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(AnalyticsTracker.Stat.READER_FOLLOWING_SHOWN)

 88→            }

 16→class ReaderTopBarMenuHelper @Inject constructor() {
 17→    fun createMenu(readerTagsList: ReaderTagList): List<MenuElementData> {
 18→        return mutableListOf<MenuElementData>().apply {
 19→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isDiscover }?.let { discoverIndex ->
 20→                add(createDiscoverItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(discoverIndex)))
 21→            }
 22→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isFollowedSites }?.let { followingIndex ->
 23→                add(createSubscriptionsItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(followingIndex)))
 24→            }
 25→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isBookmarked }?.let { savedIndex ->
 26→                add(createSavedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(savedIndex)))
 27→            }
 28→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isPostsILike }?.let { likedIndex ->
 29→                add(createLikedItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(likedIndex)))
 30→            }
 31→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isA8C }?.let { a8cIndex ->
 32→                add(createAutomatticItem(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(a8cIndex)))
 33→            }
 34→            readerTagsList.indexOrNull { it.isP2 }?.let { p2Index ->
 35→                add(createP2Item(getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(p2Index)))
 36→            }
 37→            readerTagsList
 38→                .foldIndexed(SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>()) { index, sparseArray, readerTag ->
 39→                    if (readerTag.tagType == ReaderTagType.CUSTOM_LIST) {
 40→                        sparseArray[index] = readerTag
 41→                    }
 42→                    sparseArray
 43→                }
 44→                .takeIf { it.isNotEmpty() }
 45→                ?.let { customListsArray ->
 46→                    add(MenuElementData.Divider)
 47→                    add(createCustomListsItem(customListsArray))
 48→                }
 49→        }
 50→    }
 51→
 52→    private fun createDiscoverItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 53→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 54→            id = id,
 55→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_discover),
 56→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_discover_24dp,
 57→        )
 58→    }
 59→
 60→    private fun createSubscriptionsItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 61→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 62→            id = id,
 63→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_subscriptions),
 64→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_subscriptions_24dp,
 65→        )
 66→    }
 67→
 68→    private fun createSavedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 69→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 70→            id = id,
 71→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_saved),
 72→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_saved_24dp,
 73→        )
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    private fun createLikedItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 77→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 78→            id = id,
 79→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_liked),
 80→            leadingIcon = R.drawable.ic_reader_liked_24dp,
 81→        )
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    private fun createAutomatticItem(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 85→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 86→            id = id,
 87→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_automattic),
 88→        )
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    private fun createP2Item(id: String): MenuElementData.Item.Single {
 92→        return MenuElementData.Item.Single(
 93→            id = id,
 94→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_p2),
 95→        )
 96→    }
 97→
 98→    private fun createCustomListsItem(customLists: SparseArrayCompat<ReaderTag>): MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu {
 99→        val customListsMenuItems = mutableListOf<MenuElementData.Item.Single>()
100→        customLists.forEach { index, readerTag ->
101→            customListsMenuItems.add(
102→                MenuElementData.Item.Single(
103→                    id = getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(index),
104→                    text = UiString.UiStringText(readerTag.tagTitle),
105→                )
106→            )
107→        }
108→        return MenuElementData.Item.SubMenu(
109→            // We don't need this ID since this menu item just opens the sub-menu. It doesn't
110→            // change the content that is currently being displayed.
111→            id = "custom-lists",
112→            text = UiString.UiStringRes(R.string.reader_dropdown_menu_lists),
113→            children = customListsMenuItems,
114→        )
115→    }
116→
117→    private fun getMenuItemIdFromReaderTagIndex(readerTagIndex: Int): String = "$readerTagIndex"
118→
119→    fun getReaderTagIndexFromMenuItem(menuItem: MenuElementData.Item.Single) = menuItem.id.toInt()
120→}

content.text:
All changes have been implemented successfully. Let me provide a summary of the fix:

## Summary of Changes

### Root Cause
The `ReaderTopBarMenuHelper.kt` was not including the P2 (Followed P2s) feed in the dropdown menu creation logic, even though:
- The `ReaderTag` class already has an `isP2()` method
- The `ReaderTracker` already has `ReaderTab.P2` for tracking
- The tracking method `trackReaderTabIfNecessary` already handles P2 tabs

### Changes Made
